MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
DEFENDANT BURR PILGER MAYER, INC.'s Motion For Protective Order - The Pro Tem Discovery Judge recuses himself from this action, as he and his firm has represented Defendant Burr Pilger Mayer Inc. and one of its shareholders in the past. This Motion is continued to be heard by another Pro Tem Discovery Judge on July 1, 2015, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302 per the stipulation of the parties. Judge Pro-tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
